review_body_text: - Do the same routine everyday - Communication and maintain relationship with customer is the most things i learned. - Management not so good. - Co-workers very grumpy but kind heart with c.olleagues - Hardest part is do the letter manually. - Easier work is send reminder every month
Challenging and excellent learrning curve for any fresh graduate who likes to be having a carrer in banking sector and financial services
Learn to deal with high network.Meeting with new client.Solving customer future investment plan by explain the benefits which our bank provides to them
Love working with Maybank but not with the current management. Working experience very wide. Co-workers : Average. Skills in power points - poor. Being promoted the best part.
good environment ,i been exposed with a lot of people from multiple sector with one intention which is the needs of financial services,its a good environment everyday got new stuff to learn
pros_text: Good environment, Meet new people, Great incentive

review_body_text: Good working experience as my career started and ended in Maybank. Rewards employees according to input given. Enjoyed working and growing with Maybank.

Maybank is well known bank which is care about staff welfare working hours from 8.45am to 5.45 pm im learn how to work with the experiences banker , the management abit slow interm of implement new thing,but its good because the pay salary on time and care about staff by giving medical card the hardest part while struggling to get commisyen and the enjoyble while earn a lot of commisyen

review_title: The best experiences working as customer service
review_body_text: I really enjoyed in servicing industry because I feel satisfaction when customer’s giving good feedback, compliment and feeling happy when their enquiries or problem resolve. I love customer support because I love the constant human interaction because it is our nature and it will improve my communication skill and English language. As we know, customer service relates to the service provided to customers before, during and after a purchase. Customer service is a front desk or first contact for customers to voice their inquiries, feedback and suggestions. We becomes such important to customers as well as company images. I feel such a lot of appreciation when performing job.
pros_text: Flexible scheduling due to working on shift hours

review_body_text: My role is to cover property, construction and building materials industries to support Corporate Banking, Business Banking and Client Coverage teams, and to provide industry outlook the sectors I cover. I enjoy doing in depth research and analysis on the industries I cover but it can be demanding as there are many internal customers and stakeholders to support.
pros_text: Large and established leading regional bank

review_title: being transfer to several department within a year
review_body_text: Able to adapt any challenges and having a cheerful working environment.Working with a good leadership manager and very democratic working place.
Always Smile Engaged with all levels Respect with the Management Teams Be Friendly with all staff and college. The More You Give The More You Get.
good organization to work with Great organization to grow Employees are well rewarded Good recognizations, exposures
pros_text: Event handlings, participations in social activities
cons_text: short of manpower, lack of proper training

review_body_text: I learned how to make a relationship with customer and how to make customer trust Maybank in term of services and product. Take care of customer that have long period savings with maybank and create their wealth portfolio in long term or short term.

•Contact businesses and private individuals by telephone to promote products, services and/or charitable causes •Solicit orders for goods and services over the telephone •Explain the product or service to potential customers •Deliver scripted sales pitch to the customer •Adjust scripted sales pitch to meet needs of specific individuals •Provide pricing details •Handle customer questions •Obtain customer information including names and addresses •Record customer details including reaction to the product or service offered •Receive orders over the telephone •Input order details into the computer system •Record customer details and details of transaction •Confirm orders placed with field sales representatives The working environment suit to healthy working environment
pros_text: Enjoyable working environment with organisable management

review_body_text: This company has taught me so much to becoming an independent & becoming a good team player. I have also grown with the company as I have been there for 6 years.

Hectic with long hour. Develop good knowledge in banking product and standard practice, self development in term of people skill, problem solving, leadership and sales. Staff are all open minded and helpful. The most hardest part of the job is to handle difficult customer and fraud. The most enjoyable part is when you be able to assist customer in solving their problem and provide the best solution to their needs.

An excellent platform for those who strive to excel in managing multiple projects concurrently while meeting deadlines and consistently applying analytical, problem solving and follow through skills. Challenging but fairly compensated.
Good where it gave me opportunity to advance and learn new things that relates to the banking industry. Career advancement is evident and mentors are equipped with knowledge and know-how.

what can I conclude, Maybank give a lot of benefits to their staff. they tried to make their staff comfortable during working hour. But, during I was work there, there are curtain things they miss look.

review_title: Great place to work with people-oriented culture
review_body_text: A wonderful place to work with a lot of room for personal and team growth, co-workers are more like family members and there's a common goal to strive for the greater good for the community not just for the company.
